logo_usage.placement: top area, balanced, premium, no distortion
logo_usage.notes: use logos cleanly on dark background, preserve proportions, do not invent alternative marks

creative_direction.composition: vertical poster with strong top header, dominant hero title, structured information block in the middle, clear CTA at the bottom
creative_direction.background: deep navy gradient with subtle cyan glow, glassmorphism panels, fine grid texture, geometric cube-inspired shapes that echo the SIA logo

typography.headline_style: editorial serif, bold, elegant, highly legible
typography.hierarchy: very clear, high contrast, easy to read on phone screen

creative_direction.mood: welcome, aspirational, trustworthy, institutional but visually striking

content.headline: Bienvenido a SIA
content.support_copy: SIA reune acceso institucional, modulos clave, credencial y avisos del TecNM Campus Los Cabos en un solo lugar.

important_points.title: Accede con tu correo institucional
important_points.description: Inicia sesion con tu cuenta Microsoft del TecNM y entra a tu espacio de forma segura.

important_points.title: Revisa tus modulos
important_points.description: Aula, Biblioteca, Salud Integral, Foro, Encuestas y mas desde una sola plataforma.

important_points.title: Activa tu credencial y avisos
important_points.description: Consulta tu QR digital, novedades del campus y recordatorios importantes.

important_points.title: Llevalo a tu celular
important_points.description: Instala SIA en tu pantalla de inicio para abrir el campus digital con un toque.

content.footer_note: Formato vertical 9:16 para historia, reel cover o pantalla movil.

middle_zone: 4 premium info rows with number chips or minimalist icons

text_handling: respect all Spanish copy exactly as written
logo_handling: use enough negative space around logos
export_requirements: final image must be crisp at 1080x1920
all text centered within safe area
